advice.forward_trunk_lean_risk: Excessive forward trunk lean. Reduce pace and strengthen core stability.
advice.left_right_knee_asymmetry_risk: Left-right knee motion asymmetry detected. Add unilateral stability and strength training.
advice.left_knee_alignment_risk: Left knee-ankle alignment risk is elevated. Monitor landing knee path and adjust cadence.
advice.right_knee_alignment_risk: Right knee-ankle alignment risk is elevated. Monitor landing knee path and adjust cadence.
advice.low_pose_confidence: Pose confidence is low. Improve camera angle, lighting, and resolution.
